description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme, featuring dark green and purple tones with roundel insignias on the wings and tail. The aircraft has a mid-mounted, straight wing configuration with two prominent jet engines mounted under each wing. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both painted with insignia and identification markings. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a clear canopy. The airplane's overall design suggests it is built for speed and maneuverability, with a robust metal exterior and minimal surface ornamentation.
description: A military jet airplane with a camouflage paint scheme, mid-mounted straight wings, and twin underwing jet engines. Features include a single vertical tail, roundel insignias, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical mid-mounted wings with roundel insignias.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, underwing jet engines, and detailed tail markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizer, and the full wingspan with insignias.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the jet engines, cockpit, and tail details from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles; roundel insignias on both wings.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear (not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
